Name: FAnimNode_TwistCorrectiveNode
Description:
This is the node that apply corrective morphtarget for twist 
  Good example is that if you twist your neck too far right or left, you're going to see odd stretch shape of neck, 
  This node can detect the angle and apply morphtarget curve 
  This isn't the twist control node for bone twist

Variables.Name: BaseFrame
Variables.Description: Base Frame of the reference for the twist node

Variables.Name: TwistPlaneNormalAxis
Variables.Description: Normal of the Plane that we'd like to calculate angle calculation from in BaseFrame. Please note we're looking for Normal Axis
